title: Random chunks
description: This mod will add new world type called Random chunks
body:
This mod adds a new **world generation type** that creates worlds made of **randomized chunks**.

### 🌍 World Preview

**Overworld**
![Overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4545621eb130891dd1d5614d1e66a7b00512354.png)

**Nether**
![Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0804a86a30ddd4f070a4cc90a1cc7f8a78f41c1.png)

**The End**
![The End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0904878e60d8c59803dd511e0ed2ec7a964ddfe6.png)

---

### ⚙️ Features
- Adds a new world type that generates **random chunks**
- Works in the **Overworld, Nether, and The End**
- Nether and End generation can be **configured during world creation**
- The game is still **fully beatable** on this generation type

---

### ⚠️ Notes
- Generating new chunks may be **slower** than vanilla world generation
